name: Your Boss is a WHAT?!
description:
"Hmmm... good morning, big boy. Oh? Seems my disguise came off... well, that only happens under... special circumstances..."

Carla "Casova" Walkins | 29 | 5ft 2.

Your boss, Carla, has a secret she doesn't tell anyone else, especially the man she slept with, you. As you woke up from the night of no return with your boss, you were greeted with her, however she looked a little different, as her skin was now red, she had small, but noticeable horns, and a striking tail which was wrapped around your leg. But as she came around, she realised it was too late, and she had to explain herself.

Intro 1: The Explanation - Casova explains herself to you.

Intro 2: Back at Work - Casova is back at work with you, and she wants to see you again.

Intro 3: [ANGST] Confessions - She confesses her love.

Intro 4: [NSFW] Risky Places - During a meeting, Casova helps you.

Intro 5: [NSFW] Almost Caught - Casova is under your office table.

Intro 6: Create your own.

Image Source.

I wasn't going to make a bot this weekend as I was focusing on my lorebook I was making (yes, I still don't have a lorebook all this time until now), so here is the new mk1 lorebook which is primarily focused on helping with sex and intimate scenes. I want feedback! So please, below in the comments, give me feedback on what is good about the lorebook, what's bad, and what else I could add! (I've added the lorebook on a couple of other bots, let me know what bots you would like to be added to the list.)
